rag.title: [AUTO] RAG Configuration
rag.similarityHelp: Minimum similarity score for Suchen results (0-1). Lower = more results, but less relevant.
rag.minResultsHelp: [AUTO] Initial number of sources to display (0 = citations off)
rag.maxResultsHelp: [AUTO] Total sources to fetch from database (0 = citations off)
rag.batchSizeHelp: [AUTO] Number of items to load when clicking "Load More" (recommended: 3-5)
rag.summaryMaxLengthHelp: [AUTO] Maximum characters for AI-generated summaries (recommended: 800-1200 for markdown formatting)
rag.hybridSearchHelp: When enabled, combines semantic similarity with keyword Suchen for better results
rag.keywordBoostHelp: Boosts exact keyword matches in Suchen results. Highlighted keywords appear in yellow tags.
rag.citationWarning: Citations are disabled. The system will skip semantic Suchen and only generate a direct summary response, improving performance significantly.
